file_name: Heidelberg Materials Australia – construction materials business of MAAS - Questionnaire_0.pdf

questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any quarries (fine or coarse aggregates), RMX plants, asphalt plants or waste disposal and recycling facilities you operate, the type of products you supply and/or purchase, the area(s) you service, and any commercial relationships you have with HMA or MAAS.
